summary: End-of-session knowledge propagation: inventory changes, classify, present plan, write KB docs, collect metrics, report.

content.description: Orchestrates end-of-session knowledge propagation and metrics collection.

steps.name: Inventory
steps.instruction: List what changed: decisions, state changes, artifacts, learnings. Skip implementation details. Capture session cost.

steps.name: Classify
steps.instruction: For each item: determine type, lifecycle, tags, id. Check index for existing docs to update.

steps.name: Present plan
steps.instruction: Show the user: new docs, updates, skipped items, commit strategy. Wait for approval.

steps.name: Execute
steps.instruction: Write JSON docs to KB following schema. Stage exact files. Commit with clear message.

steps.name: Collect metrics
steps.instruction: Compile session metric entry and write to KB as type: metric doc.

steps.name: Report
steps.instruction: Brief report: commit SHA, files changed, metrics collected, deferred items.

do_not: Run without explicit trigger from user
Manufacture propagation when inventory is empty
